ValidationRule.description: Force the user to provide expected sign date when the Opportunity Stage is Contract Request and Contract Negotiations
ValidationRule.errorConditionFormula: AND( OR( ISPICKVAL(StageName, "Contract Request"), ISPICKVAL(StageName, "Contract Negotiations"), ISPICKVAL(Request_Stage_Progression__c,'Request Progression to Contract Request/MOU Approved') ), ISBLANK(Expected_Sign_Date__c), (ISCHANGED(StageName) || ISCHANGED(Request_Stage_Progression__c)) )
